overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the futuristic Night City urban environment. The character approaches and inspects a distinctive purple van before continuing along the sidewalk and crossing a busy intersection with towering skyscrapers and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with street barriers and vendors

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete sidewalk behind a pedestrian wearing orange shorts

notable_agents.action: purple van driving parallel to the sidewalk approaching from behind

entered.detail: wide concrete pedestrian walkway with red painted curbs
concrete and metal barriers lining the edge of the sidewalk
tall palm trees lining the street in the distance
tall dark skyscraper with large 07 signage visible on the facade
futuristic purple and silver van with boxy cyberpunk design

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character along a futuristic city sidewalk. The environment features concrete barriers, palm trees, and the distinctive 07 skyscraper visible in the distance. A purple van approaches on the adjacent multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street intersection with vehicle inspection

events.description: camera stops following character and begins rotating around the purple van for inspection

agents.ego_description: character stops walking to inspect the purple van from multiple angles as the camera orbits around it

entered.detail: dark asphalt street surface with white lane markings

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions to focus entirely on the purple van, rotating around it to show details of its cyberpunk design including chrome bumpers and rectangular headlights. The surrounding street and distant skyscrapers remain visible in the background as the camera performs a slow orbit.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with digital billboards and crossing traffic

events.description: camera resumes following character and continues walking forward
large military truck drives through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and crossing the busy intersection while navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: large green military-style truck with multiple axles driving through the intersection

entered.detail: zebra crossing lines painted on the asphalt for pedestrian crossing
tall structure with multiple stacked digital screens displaying advertisements
heavy-duty military vehicle with six wheels and green paint

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to following the character as they walk past the van and approach a busy intersection. The character crosses the street while a large military truck passes by, with the 07 skyscraper and vibrant digital billboards dominating the background. Other pedestrians are scattered throughout the crosswalk area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic city sidewalk that shifts from a focused inspection of a vehicle to a wide traversal of a bustling urban intersection. It begins by following a character past concrete barriers and palm trees with the 07 skyscraper looming in the distance as a purple van approaches on the road. The camera then breaks away to orbit the van, rotating slowly to highlight its chrome bumpers and rectangular headlights against the backdrop of the city skyline. As the focus returns to the character, the scene expands toward a busy crosswalk where the camera tracks them past a large military truck. The shot finally opens up to reveal a dense cityscape dominated by vibrant digital billboards and scattered pedestrians under the shadow of the towering 07 skyscraper.
